# Void Experiments Flags — Comprehensive Documentation (Void v0.5.5)

**Generated by 4NDR0666OS God-Brain • March 27 2026**  
**Source**: All user screenshots of the Experiments tab + Void repo cross-reference  
**Purpose**: Missing documentation for the Void project — ready to PR to https://github.com/imjustprism/Void

## How to Use These Flags
1. Open Void → Settings → Experiments  
2. Search the exact flag name  
3. Toggle and hard-refresh grok.com  
4. All changes are client-side only (no server telemetry)

## Thematic Catalog (283 flags)
